title: Your Report Title
subtitle: A descriptive subtitle, often a single line.
summary: A 1-2 sentence summary that appears on cards and search results.
_optional_signal: Remove the underscore prefix to ALSO inject a signal entry announcing this report

_signal.excerpt: 1-2 sentences for the signals index card.
takeaways: First takeaway as a single sentence.

_optional_briefing: Remove the underscore prefix to ALSO add a briefing entry referencing this report

_briefing.title: A Briefing Title Linked to This Report
_briefing.blurb: A 1-2 sentence blurb that appears on the briefings index and the homepage.
